nasb.text: See to it that no one comes short of the grace of God; that no root of bitterness springing up causes trouble, and by it many be defiled;

esv.text: See to it that no one fails to obtain the grace of God; that no “root of bitterness” springs up and causes trouble, and by it many become defiled;

cnv.text: 你們要小心，免得有人失去了　神的恩典；免得有苦根長起來纏繞你們，因而污染了許多人；

ccb.text: 你们要谨慎，以免有人失去上帝的恩典，长出苦毒的根扰乱你们，玷污众人。

csbs.text: 你们要谨慎，免得有人亏缺了神的恩典；免得有苦毒的根长起来搅扰你们，使许多人因此被污秽了；
